reasons.text: The countertops of the built-in kitchen island/peninsula and the main L-shaped cabinetry have been replaced (from grey laminate to a lighter wood-grain finish). The provided context explicitly states that 'replacing the countertop of a built-in alters its permanent structure and character', and this is corroborated by the 'ISLAND_CHANGED' and 'CABINETRY_CHANGED' anchor flags. This also constitutes a change to the 'silhouette envelope' of built-in elements, even if their geometric footprint remains similar.
